\documentclass[referee]{article}
% This fixture deliberately triggers as many pre-flight checks as possible
% so the [error]/[warn] surface is easy to inspect end-to-end.

\usepackage{minted}        % shell-escape → [error]
\usepackage{psfig}         % no-longer-supported → [error]
\usepackage{xr}            % external refs break on arXiv → [warn]
\usepackage{makeidx}
\makeindex
\usepackage{glossaries}
\makeglossaries

\title{Pre-flight checks demo}
\date{\today}              % \today inside \date → [warn]

\begin{document}
\maketitle

\section{Body}
\includegraphics{photo.eps}  % .eps figure → [warn]

\printindex                  % \printindex without .ind shipped → [warn]
\printglossary               % \printglossary without .gls shipped → [warn]

\end{document}
